sectionInfo.title: Featured Projects
sectionInfo.description: A showcase of my most significant projects, demonstrating my skills and expertise in software development, AI, and cloud solutions.

projects.title: Academica – Academic Networking Platform
projects.description: A social-academic platform built for students and mentors to collaborate, use resources,apply for jobs and connect based on academic interests.
keyFeatures: User authentication and personalized feeds
Resource sharing and academic discussion forums
Integrated notifications and user profile management

projects.title: Ohiohoo Skincare – Cosmetic E-commerce Website
projects.description: A complete skincare product website with user-friendly UI, skincare APIs, and Selenium testing for automation.
keyFeatures: Responsive UI with interactive product catalog
API integration for skincare product listings
Automated testing suite using Selenium

projects.title: MIME Recognition for Indian Sign Language
projects.description: A user-friendly interface for recognizing and translating Indian sign language using deep learning models.
keyFeatures: Real-time sign detection using webcam feed
Bi-directional translation between text and signs
Trained custom CNN for accuracy
Published in IEEE

projects.title: Secure File Transfer using Blockchain and Cryptography
projects.description: Designed a decentralized file-sharing solution using blockchain with AES and RSA for encryption.
keyFeatures: Secure file transmission using cryptographic protocols
Blockchain ledger to ensure tamper-proof records
Decentralized data access control
Published in Springer

projects.title: Image Classification using CNN (CIFAR-10)
projects.description: Trained a convolutional neural network model using PyTorch to classify CIFAR-10 images.
keyFeatures: Custom CNN model from scratch
Achieved >70% validation accuracy
Plotted learning curves for model tuning

projects.title: End-to-End CI/CD Pipeline Implementation on AWS
projects.description: Deployed a web application on AWS with continuous integration and delivery setup using DevOps tools.
keyFeatures: Automated end-to-end deployment with rollback support
Integrated GitHub repo with CodePipeline for live deployments
Infrastructure-as-Code setup using CloudFormation templates

projects.title: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation
projects.description: Implemented a convolutional neural network to perform precise biomedical image segmentation, targeting enhanced diagnostics in healthcare applications.
keyFeatures: Designed and trained CNN model for pixel-wise segmentation of biomedical images
Preprocessed and augmented datasets to improve model generalization
Validated model using real-world biomedical imaging datasets for healthcare applicability

projects.title: Secure Transfer of Files within Organization using AES, RSA, and Decentralized Blockchain
projects.description: Built a secure communication framework for enterprise file transfer using hybrid cryptography and blockchain for decentralized logging and validation.
keyFeatures: Utilized AES for fast symmetric encryption and RSA for secure key exchange
Incorporated a decentralized blockchain structure for tamper-proof logging
Enhanced internal data security and traceability within organizations
